nodes.context: Criminal organization in New Orleans, Louisiana, operating in the 11th and 10th Wards, involved in drug trafficking, murder, theft, and kidnapping.
Criminal organization from New Orleans, feuding with the 110ers Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: In recent years the gang have been known to feud with the Young Melph Mafia and the Ride or Die Gang from the 8th Ward of New Orleans.
edges.context: The 110ers Gang feuds with the Young Melph Mafia.
